arts.ttl: Graeme Souness delivers scathing Manchester United verdict as Cristiano Ronaldo point made
arts.sum: The former Premier League midfielder believes Manchester United failed to keep the right people at the club

arts.ttl: Amorim criticised for 'MAD' Man Utd transfer decision
arts.sum: The Red Devils boss is determined to sign at least five new players during the 2025 summer transfer window and the club are open to selling the likes of Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford and Mainoo in order to generate ‘pure profit.’ However, former Liverpool and Fulham midfielder Danny Murphy believes Man Utd would be “mad” to sell Mainoo this summer, despite the fact that his current contract at Old Trafford is due to expire in 2027.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Man United squad members vs Wolves as Amorim handed injury boost
arts.sum: Man Utd play Wolves in the Premier League today and the players have arrived at Old Trafford for the game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make SHOCK Andre Onana transfer decision
arts.sum: The 29-year-old has been heavily criticised for a number of high-profile errors in recent weeks and Ruben Amorim is eager to bring a new goalkeeper to Old Trafford ahead of the new season. The report claims that Onana could be set to retain his place as Man Utd’s first-choice goalkeeper next season, despite his recent form, although the Red Devils will consider a sale if their asking price is met.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'lining up £51m offer' for 6ft 5in Germany international
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly lining up a £51m offer for Inter Milan defender Yann Bisseck, who has impressed for the Italian giants this season.

arts.ttl: Man United ready to offer Marcus Rashford to sign 15-goal Premier League star
arts.sum: Manchester United want to sign a striker in the summer transfer window and Ruben Amorim is ready to use one of his players to bring a new striker to Old Trafford. The Red Devils have struggled in front of goal this season with both Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee failing to make an impact. arts.ttl: Amorim Must Unleash 'Special' Man Utd Academy Star v Wolves After New Comments
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim must hand this 'special' Man Utd academy star his full debut against Wolves after his latest comments.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana's future at Man Utd uncertain as Ruben Amorim faces £60m decision
arts.sum: Andre Onana has come in for criticism during his time at Manchester United and the goalkeeper could miss a number of games next season depending on Ruben Amorim's decision

arts.ttl: Man United receive Nico Williams injury update ahead of crucial Europa League semi-final tie
arts.sum: It remains unclear how many games the Athletic Club star will miss, following the club’s injury statement

arts.ttl: Manchester United set sights on AS Monaco ace – Pep Guardiola braces for Red Devils approach
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to rival Manchester City for AS Monaco attacker Maghnes Akliouche, outlets in France have claimed. L’Equipe have published a story related to the right-winger and his current side’s position pertaining to his future.
